hooks.command: if jq -e '((.tool_input.new_string // .tool_input.content) // "") as $s | .tool_input.file_path as $p | ($p | test("api/.*\\.js$")) and ($s | test("\"AE\"")) and ($s | test("\"AH\"")) and ($s | test("\"BM\"")) and ($s | test("\"ZP\""))' >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo '{"systemMessage":"⚠ Detected a 38-entry L1 code dictionary in api/*.js. This table lives in data/l1_standard_38.json (bundled via vercel.json includeFiles) — import it at module init (see api/analyze.js for the pattern) instead of hardcoding."}'; fi
